prompt: I just dropped a research paper PDF into my raw/ folder. Process it into my wiki. The file is raw/9_Reflexion_Verbal_Reinforcement_Learning.pdf

assertions.text: A wiki directory structure exists with concept pages (not just a single file)
At least 3 separate concept pages were created
An index.md exists listing all concept pages with descriptions
Pages contain [[wiki-style links]] to other pages in the wiki
A source summary file exists documenting what was extracted from the PDF
A processed.json or similar tracking mechanism exists to prevent re-ingestion
Pages are substantial (>150 words, not stubs) with real explanations
